overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy game showing a robed character exploring a narrow stone dungeon corridor with a torch. The environment features medieval stone architecture, debris, and atmospheric low lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone dungeon corridor with broken walls and exposed roots

agents.ego_description: robed character walks cautiously through the dungeon corridor holding a torch to light the way

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone blocks forming the left corridor wall
weathered stone wall with rough texture and cracks
large ceramic jars and pots stacked against the wall
dark rectangular opening or window in the right wall
thick tree roots breaking through the stone wall
uneven stone pavement with cracks and missing pieces

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow stone dungeon corridor illuminated by torchlight. The walls feature a window opening and exposed tree roots breaking through the masonry, with pottery jars sitting against the left wall and broken tiles underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: deeper dungeon passage with wall fixtures and debris

events.description: a fallen body becomes visible on the corridor floor ahead in the torchlight

agents.ego_description: character continues forward approaching a motionless figure lying on the ground near a dark doorway

notable_agents.action: body lying face down and motionless on the stone floor in the distance

entered.detail: iron ring fixture mounted on the stone wall
humanoid corpse lying prone on the ground before the doorway

segments.scene_description: Continuing deeper into the dungeon, the character passes a metal ring fixture on the left wall and approaches a dark doorway at the corridor's end. A motionless body lies prone on the ground ahead, suggesting a fallen explorer or victim, while scattered debris litters the stone floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow stone dungeon corridor that transitions from a weathered passageway into a grim scene of death. It begins with the character walking past masonry broken by exposed tree roots and pottery jars, with torchlight flickering across broken tiles underfoot. As the camera pushes deeper into the corridor, the environment shifts past a metal ring fixture on the left wall toward a looming dark doorway. The scene then opens up to reveal a motionless body lying prone on the debris-strewn floor, marking the end of the passage.
